data.body: 9/10 leaves closed+signed (ac0e,e1f2,74d9,24ec,f32e,a37b,9f25,b9c0,a8e5). a8e5 final 3 findings were the make lint/typecheck/test build-command ACs (verifier can't execute them) — ran them on the current tree (lint PASS, typecheck PASS 303 files, 147 a8e5-affected tests pass; full suite 5647 green in pre-flight modulo 2 env-only), recorded as a build-command attestation comment, re-closed PASS+signed. Hit a transient tickets-tracker index.lock (stale, 0-byte, no rebar proc) — removed it and retried. Now closing d4cf (last leaf). AFTER d4cf: rebase full rewritten stack onto current origin/main, re-push to gerrit (updates 613-617 patchsets after all the a8e5/a37b/9f25 fixups + folds), wait for fresh Verified+LLM green on all 10, record epic 9d50 AC2 comment, close epic, submit stack top to land.
